notes: Unique trade identifier; may be document key or field
Asset pair: BTC ETH etc; used for filtering and reporting
Direction: LONG or SHORT; essential for MFE/MAE calculation
Market regime classification; useful for analysis but not critical
Entry price in BTC; baseline for MFE/MAE calculation
Exit price in BTC; end point for analysis
Entry timestamp (unix seconds); enables time-based filtering
Exit timestamp or close_time; critical for recent-trade filtering
Trade size in BTC; optional for this analysis
Duration of trade in seconds; optional
Gross profit before fees; essential for entry-edge validation
Total fee cost in BTC; required for net-vs-gross comparison
Slippage cost in BTC; required for cost analysis
Net profit after fees; reconciles with snapshot
Exit type: SCRATCH_EXIT STAGNATION_EXIT TP SL etc; filters diagnosis
Trade result: WIN LOSS or FLAT; classification for MFE analysis
Document status field: closed or open; filters to completed trades
Highest price during hold; CRITICAL for MFE calculation. Probe determines if persisted.
Lowest price during hold; CRITICAL for MAE calculation. Probe determines if persisted.
Pre-calculated MFE percent; alternative to max_seen if provided
Pre-calculated MAE percent; alternative to min_seen if provided
Bucket classification: C_WEAK D_NEG_EV_CONTROL etc; enables filtering
Data source indicator; may help isolate canonical trades
Explicit flag marking canonical trades vs shadow; may not exist
Legacy field; fallback if net_pnl missing
TP threshold; useful for exit-vs-entry diagnosis
SL threshold; useful for exit-vs-entry diagnosis
Actual hold duration; alternative to hold_seconds
Timeout setting; context for stagnation exits
